case_title: ALEKSANDR GRATS VS. ALISON IRENE CORCORAN

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED NOV-15-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORCORAN, ALISON IRENE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $450.00 FILED BY CORCORAN, ALISON IRENE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GRATS, ALEKSANDR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CORCORAN, ALISON IRENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GRATS, ALEKSANDR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CORCORAN, ALISON IRENE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRATS, ALEKSANDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORCORAN, ALISON IRENE $2,211.09 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,261.09 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-16-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
